g.text: Popular Applications of Artificial Neural Networks

g.data-narration: Artificial Neural Networks have transformed industries by enabling systems to learn complex patterns from data, achieving human-level or superhuman performance.
g.text: ANNs learn complex patterns from data, powering modern AI applications across
industries. From computer vision to healthcare, they achieve remarkable results.

g.data-narration: Three landmark achievements triggered the deep learning revolution: AlexNet winning ImageNet 2012, AlphaGo defeating Go champion 2016, and Transformers in 2017.
Computer Vision uses CNNs to analyze images. CNNs use convolutional layers to detect spatial features like edges, textures, and shapes in images.
Major CV applications include medical imaging for disease detection, autonomous driving for real-time object detection, and facial recognition for identity verification.
Natural Language Processing uses Transformers and RNNs to process text. Transformers use attention mechanisms to focus on relevant words when processing sequences.
NLP powers machine translation like Google Translate, text generation with GPT models, sentiment analysis for brand monitoring, and virtual assistants like Siri.
Healthcare applications include disease diagnosis from medical images, drug discovery by predicting molecular properties, and personalized treatment recommendations.

g.text: CNN rivals expert radiologists in image analysis
⏱ Drug discovery: Years → Months with virtual screening

g.data-narration: Finance uses ANNs for fraud detection analyzing transaction patterns, algorithmic trading using market data, and credit scoring with alternative data sources.
Self-driving vehicles use ANNs for perception (object detection), localization, path planning, and control. Companies like Waymo and Tesla lead this space.
g.text: Leaders: Waymo, Tesla, Uber ATG, Cruise

g.data-narration: Gaming AI achieved major milestones: AlphaGo defeated world Go champion, OpenAI Five beat pro Dota 2 teams, and AlphaZero mastered chess from scratch.
Recommendation systems use collaborative filtering and content-based methods. Netflix, Amazon, Spotify, and YouTube all use neural networks for personalized suggestions.

g.text: Collaborative Filtering: Learn from user behavior patterns
Content-Based: Match item features to preferences

g.data-narration: Additional ANN applications include cybersecurity for intrusion detection, manufacturing for predictive maintenance reducing downtime by 30-50%.
Understanding which ANN architecture to use: CNNs for spatial data like images, RNNs/Transformers for sequences like text, Autoencoders for anomaly detection.
For exams, know 2-3 applications per domain, match architectures to domains with reasoning, and remember key breakthroughs like AlphaGo and ImageNet.
